description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

This tour has been closed to new applications due to organizer circumstances. Hike toward Bonomine peak summit, learning the basics of stream walking on the scenic Shiratani Valley route with gorge terrain, and enjoy the streams. Lunch and dinner feature carefully prepared bento boxes and a full dinner from a game meat restaurant, with opportunities to learn about game meats.

【Fee】
¥23,000 per person (includes guide fee, lunch/dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】
5 people

【Guide】
Tsuyoshi Shinohara, Japan Mountain Guides Association member, Mountain Guide Stage III

【What to bring】
20-liter backpack (fully waterproofed), complete stream hiking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountain hiking equipment, bus fare, bathhouse fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: Stream hiking on Bonomine peak and Gorge through Naguri River Shiratani Valley, learning basics and enjoying game meat dinner tour
